title: Symphony Codex smoke test
description: Smoke-test the Symphony Codex workflow. In the isolated workspace only, create .symphony/smoke/processed.txt containing: processed by Symphony Codex. Do not change tracked source files. After creating the proof file, close this Beads issue with reason: Symphony Codex smoke processed.
acceptance_criteria: The issue is processed by Symphony, the workspace contains .symphony/smoke/processed.txt with the exact text, and the Beads issue is closed.

title: Configure Codex sandbox for Beads and Git
description: Allow Symphony Codex agents to use repo-shared Beads state and routine Git operations from workspace-write sessions.
close_reason: Configured WORKFLOW.md to pass Codex workspace-write sandbox roots for repo Beads state, repo Git metadata, generated workspaces, and network access; global ~/.codex rule changes were intentionally not applied after security review.
